description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a steep red gable roof, surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall evergreen trees. The front facade features two symmetrically placed windows on the upper level and a central blue door, with a paved driveway leading to a carport on the left side. The property includes a fenced yard, a paved patio area with outdoor seating, and a small garden with shrubs and hedges. The carport is attached to the left side of the house and shelters two vehicles, while additional parking is available on the driveway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard bordered by trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The overall layout is compact and suburban, with clear boundaries and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A brick bungalow with a red gable roof, surrounded by evergreen trees, featuring a carport, driveway, and a fenced yard with a patio and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two upper windows, carport, driveway, patio, and dense tree line in the background.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the tree line, with the back of the house and carport partially visible behind the trees.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the gable end of the roof, the carport, and the driveway, with trees forming a thick border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entrance, blue door, driveway, carport, and a clear view of the fenced yard and parked cars.
